revision.comment: this is only being used by [[Template:WPBM|WPBM]] so can be simplified
simplify, defaults to yes, and no parameter not used
gah, now I need this for the new NOTE stuff to work nicely
allow different behaviour for blank input
Making this template substable (sorry, job queue): Would be very usable to generalize input to some user talk page templates. Tested.
add support for true/false, per request
add support for on/off, per discussion
add additional paramerters, "t", "f" - requested on talk - worked in sandbox /testcases

Text replacement - "[[Category:List of Shikinaisha]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:List of Shikinaisha]]</noinclude>"

Adding [[Category:qq]]<noinclude>[[Category:Attempt at corrected List of Shikinaisha]][[Category:jawiki link]][[ja:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>[[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

1 revision imported: overwriting coordinates so I hope they start working
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting

1 revision imported: importing [[Template:Commons category]] from English wikipedia with removed timestamps to overwrite existing code, attempting to fix an error that makes the link not properly appear.
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
1 revision imported: overwriting this template since it seems broken in how it treats unknown parameters in [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
